name: Cynthia Lummis
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $145,981 for Cynthia Lummis in U.S. Senate, WY. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
